relationships: kab:Tom ur yelli ara akked Mary akken ilaq
kab:Yetturar ddabex n uḍar akked mmi-s
kab:Ur nemmeslay ara nekk akked Tom ɣef anect-a
kab:Ur ttuɣaleɣ ara ad mmeslayeɣ akked Tom
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwatan ɣef kra yellan
kab:Tom akked Mary mačči deg Boston i llan
kab:Sami ur yessin ara ad yelḥu akked medden
kab:Tom akked Mary ttmeslayen s ttawil
kab:Stufan Tom akked Mary akka tura﹖
kab:Tom yella akked Mary kra yekka wass
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwafaqen ɣef kra yellan
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ icahen akked Tom﹖
kab:Ayen ur tetteddumt ara ad turaremt akked Tom﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ akked Tom urar n mmet-a-ccix﹖
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ ccix-mmet akked Tom﹖
kab:Ulac Tom akked Mary di Ustralya tura
kab:Tom akked Mary zemren ad meslayen i sin Tafṛansist
kab:Tom akked Mary ur llin ara di Ustralya tura
kab:Deg usegnaf i llan Tom akked Mary﹖
kab:Acuɣeṛ ur tettedduḍ ara ad turareḍ akked Tom﹖
kab:Ula d nekk bɣiɣ ad mmeslayeɣ akked Tom
kab:Ayɣeṛ ur tetteddum ara ad turarem akked Tom﹖
kab:Tesɛiḍ tarmit akked talɣiwin n tẓuri yemgaraden ﹖
kab:Aqcic-nni i la yettmeslayen akked Mary, d Tom
